items.summary: The Minister said the titles, covering lands worth about ₹1,000 crore, would give long-time occupants in Mangalagiri and Tadepalli mandals legal ownership and the ability to rai...

items.title: VAT to be cut from household electricity bills in October
items.summary: Homes will save around £45 a year through the cut announced on Andy Burnham's first full day as prime minister.

items.title: At Least 27 Dead in Guyana After Ferry Capsizes
items.summary: Dozens of others are feared dead as crews scour for bodies after the vessel sank on its way to a gold-mining outpost in the South American country.
